## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] I synced my fork with upstream main before branching (`git fetch upstream && git rebase upstream/main`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] New filter has a matching test file
- [ ] New filter is registered in `filters/filters.go`
- [ ] New filter has a sanity guard in `filters/sanity_guards.go` (if applicable)
- [ ] Commit message follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
